---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-10-02"
---

Load libraries.

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(multcomp)
```

Load and modify data to fit the format we want.

```{r}
temp_data <- read_excel("Male cohort 2 - PO/Data to plot - cohort 2.xlsx", sheet = "Temp_2")
temp_data$`Mouse Group` <- ifelse(temp_data$`Mouse Group` == 'Vehicle', 'Veh\n(PO)', ifelse(temp_data$`Mouse Group` == 'GDCA (10mg/kg, PO)', 'G_10\n(PO)', 'G_50\n(PO)'))
temp_data$`Mouse Group` <- factor(temp_data$`Mouse Group`,
                                levels = c("Veh\n(PO)", "G_10\n(PO)", "G_50\n(PO)"))
temp_data <- dplyr::rename(temp_data, MouseGroup = `Mouse Group`)

temp_data$Time <- factor(temp_data$Time, levels = c(0, 10, 30, 60))
```

Plot.

```{r}
custom_colors <- c("30"="#008888", "10"="#880088", "0"="#000080", "60"="#E69F00")

pd <- position_dodge(width = 0.65)

ggplot(temp_data, aes(x = MouseGroup, y = Value)) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(color = Time),
    fun = mean,
    geom = "bar",
    fill = "white",
    position = pd,
    width = 0.4,
    alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    aes(color = Time),
    fun.data = mean_se,
    geom = "errorbar",
    position = pd,
    width = 0.08
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(color = Time),
    position = pd,
    size = 1,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  labs(y = "Body temperature (°C)", color = "Time (Min)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(25, 45))

ggsave("Male cohort 2 - PO/Temp_Graph_cohort2.pdf", width = 4, height = 2)
```

Statistics. One-way anova with Dunnett's posthoc within each group.

```{r}
# Vehicle
veh <- dplyr::filter(temp_data, MouseGroup == 'Veh\n(PO)')
# https://biostat.jhsph.edu/~iruczins/teaching/materials/code/av5/c.av5.a.html
anova_result_veh <- aov(Value ~ Time, data = veh)
summary(anova_result_veh)
dunnett_result_veh <- glht(anova_result_veh,
                               linfct=mcp(Time="Dunnett"))
summary(dunnett_result_veh)
confint(dunnett_result_veh)

# GDCA (10 mg/kg)
gdca_10 <- dplyr::filter(temp_data, MouseGroup == 'G_10\n(PO)')
anova_result_g10 <- aov(Value ~ Time, data = gdca_10)
summary(anova_result_g10)

# GDCA (50 mg/kg)
gdca_50 <- dplyr::filter(temp_data, MouseGroup == 'G_50\n(PO)')
anova_result_g50 <- aov(Value ~ Time, data = gdca_50)
summary(anova_result_g50)
dunnett_result_g50 <- glht(anova_result_g50,
                               linfct=mcp(Time="Dunnett"))
summary(dunnett_result_g50)
confint(dunnett_result_g50)
```
